MINORIS-HOVERTIP-STRESS_RESPONSE: This turn, whenever you play a card, lose {HpLoss} HP and gain {Block} Block.
MINORIS-HOVERTIP-TOY_CLAW: At start of turn, add {Amount} "Scratch" to hand
MINORIS-HOVERTIP-KITTEN_KNIFE: When your Attack deals unblocked damage, deal {Amount} additional damage to the target
MINORIS-HOVERTIP-BRONZE_GAUNTLET: When your Attack deals unblocked damage, gain {Amount} Block
MINORIS-HOVERTIP-SOLAR_FORM: At the start of your turn, add one Attack, one Skill, and one Power to your hand. Their cost is 0 and they are Ethereal.
